name: TeamCity
description: Monitor JetBrains TeamCity CI/CD server for user access, role-based permissions, and build activity

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your TeamCity server as an administrator
2. Click your username (top-right) > Profile
3. Go to Access Tokens
4. Click Create access token
5. Give it a name and set the permissions (admin recommended for full visibility)
6. Copy the generated token
7. Enter your TeamCity server URL and token below

credentialFields.label: TeamCity Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your TeamCity server URL (e.g., https://teamcity.example.com). Do not include a trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate in TeamCity: My Settings & Tools > Access Tokens. The token user should have admin-level permissions to list users and builds.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all TeamCity users and verifies each has roles assigned, providing evidence of who has access to the CI/CD server

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies TeamCity users have scoped role assignments following least-privilege principles, flagging system administrators for review

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies TeamCity build configurations are actively running builds, providing evidence of continuous integration and code change tracking
